news.title: Motorcyclist’s camera captures Gwinnett man allegedly pointing gun during road rage confrontation
news.summary: A Gwinnett County man was arrested at his job after police say he pointed a gun at another driver during a road rage confrontation.

news.title: 3 Fayetteville officers fired for misusing license plate system
news.summary: The Fayetteville Police Department has terminated three of its officers after an internal audit exposed unauthorized searches within a public safety tracking database.

news.title: Thief saws through gate to steal SUV from Marietta dealership
news.summary: Police are searching for a masked man who sliced through a chain on a heavy metal gate and drove off with a $100,000 SUV.

news.title: 1 person dead after shooting in Decatur, police say
news.summary: Police located a man suffering from a gunshot wound, who they said later died of his injuries.

news.title: Henry County police seek suspect in June murder case
news.summary: Henry County police have issued murder warrants for Darius Reeves Jr., wanted in the fatal June shooting of Charvis Buckholts.
